---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new workflow, script capability, verification improvement, or documentation enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the capability you want to add or improve.

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the expected behavior at a high level.

## Scope

- [ ] workflow behavior
- [ ] memory / learning
- [ ] installer / integration
- [ ] validation / verification
- [ ] cross-platform support
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] open-source governance

## Boundaries

Please call out whether your proposal would change any of these:

- explicit opt-in behavior
- trust / automation boundaries
- durable memory write behavior
- promotion or skill generation behavior

## Verification Idea

How should maintainers confirm the feature works?

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or simpler approaches if relevant.

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or related files if helpful.
